Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Catalyzes the formation of 5-methyl-uridine at position 54 (m5U54) in all tRNA (PubMed:10864043, PubMed:12003492, PubMed:17205207, PubMed:7074684). May also have a role in tRNA stabilization or maturation (PubMed:12003492). Also involved in the formation of 5-methyl-uridine in mRNA, which alters the elongation step in protein synthesis in a position-dependent manner, slowing amino acid addition by the ribosome (PubMed:37181630). Displays 5'-3' exonuclease activity on double-strand (ds) DNA, and endonuclease activity on single-strand (ss) DNA, characteristic of endo-exonucleases. May be involved in DNA double-strand break repair (PubMed:17205207). {ECO:0000269|PubMed:10864043, ECO:0000269|PubMed:12003492, ECO:0000269|PubMed:17205207, ECO:0000269|PubMed:37181630, ECO:0000269|PubMed:7074684}.
